_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: If you don't mind my asking
expression: If you don't mind my asking

sentences.en: ★ If you don't mind my asking, uh, how much do you make at your job?
sentences.ko: ★ 실례가 안 된다면, 그 일로 얼마나 버나요?

sentences.en: Uh, how much money do I make? About 40 cents an hour.
